journal_entry.reason: Under IAS 16.16(c), the cost of an item of property, plant and equipment includes the initial estimate of the costs of dismantling and removing the item and restoring the site. The offshore marine structure is recorded at its total cost of $5,950,000 (purchase price $4,000,000 plus present value of restoration obligation $1,950,000). The structure was acquired on account, creating a trade payable of $4,000,000. The restoration obligation creates a decommissioning provision liability of $1,950,000. Total debits ($5,950,000) equal total credits ($4,000,000 + $1,950,000).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Tidewater acquired an offshore marine structure for $4,000,000 on account and has a legal obligation to restore the site at the end of the 10-year permit term. Under IFRS (IAS 16.16(c)), the present value of the restoration obligation ($1,950,000) must be capitalized into the carrying amount of the asset. The total asset cost is therefore $5,950,000. The purchase on account creates a trade payable of $4,000,000, and the restoration obligation creates a decommissioning provision of $1,950,000. The entry records the asset at its full cost and recognizes both liabilities.
